title: Enhanced Soul Speed
description: Boosts Soul Speed Effect while sprinting
body:
# Enhanced Soul Speed
This mod enhances the effect of the vanilla soul speed enchantment. 

While walking normally, speed is unchanged.

While sprinting, speed is increased by 2-6x depending on the level of enchantment.

Soul Speed I is three times as fast as it's base enchantment, Soul Speed II is 5 times as fast, and Soul Speed III is 7 times as fast. 

| Enchantment Level   | Vanilla Max Speed     | Enhanced Max Speed   |
|---------------------|-----------------------|----------------------|
| I                   | 7.88 B/s              | 23.66 B/s            |
| II                  | 8.47 B/s              | 42.37 B/s            |
| III                 | 9.06 B/s              | 63.45 B/s            |

All speed measurements are in Blocks per second. These measurements were captured using this [Speedometer Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/speedometer)

These changes increase the utility of the Soul Speed enchantment, allowing a player with Soul Speed III to travel faster than a player with an elytra.
